name: Rosemary Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Season the chicken with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Place the chicken on the grill and cook for 8 minutes on each side.
4. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
5. In a food processor, puree all ingredients together until smooth.
6. Toss the potatoes with the rosemary mixture, coating each potato completely.
7. Place the potatoes on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
8. Roast the potatoes for 10-15 minutes or until they are golden brown.
9. Remove the potatoes from the oven and place them on a platter.
10. Arrange the chicken along the side.
11. Garnish with fresh rosemary sprigs.
